---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Use the cards below to explore my work"
toc: false
---



---

## Shiny Apps

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}

### Model Statistic Performance Data (Adding soon)

Describe the app in 2–3 sentences. What does a user do with it? What data does it show? What's the key interaction?

::: {.card-tags}
[Shiny]{.tag} [plotly]{.tag} [DT]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[Live App ↗](https://yourusername.shinyapps.io/app-one)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/app-one)
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}

### App Title Two

Describe the app in 2–3 sentences. What does a user do with it? What data does it show? What's the key interaction?

::: {.card-tags}
[Shiny]{.tag} [leaflet]{.tag} [sf]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[Live App ↗](https://yourusername.shinyapps.io/app-two)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/app-two)
:::
:::

:::

---

## Analyses & Reports

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}


### Parameterized Reporting

Describe the analysis in 2–3 sentences. What question does it answer? What dataset? What methods?

::: {.card-tags}
[quarto]{.tag} [fill me]{.tag} [fill me]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[Read Report →](projects/analysis-one.qmd)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/analysis-one)
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}

### PCA of Countermovement Jump Data

Describe the analysis in 2–3 sentences. What question does it answer? What dataset? What methods?

::: {.card-tags}
[PCA]{.tag} [fill me]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[Read Report →](projects/analysis-two.qmd)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/analysis-two)
:::
:::

:::

---

## Scripts & Pipelines

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}

### Script / Pipeline Title

Describe what this script does in 2–3 sentences. What data goes in, what comes out, how is it automated?

::: {.card-tags}
[purrr]{.tag} [readr]{.tag} [janitor]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[See Walkthrough →](projects/my-script.qmd)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/my-script)
:::
:::

:::
